case_title: JOEL BEJARANO VS. URBAN CONSTRUCTION CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEJARANO, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT URBAN CONSTRUCTION CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE AND MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTER EGO AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEJARANO, JOEL HEARING SET FOR OCT-20-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTGER EGO, JOHN ZEFENG LOWE, AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BEJARANO, JOEL
SUBSITUTION OF ATTORNEY STEPHEN M. KAPPOS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEJARANO, JOEL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOEL BEJARANO'S NOTICE AND MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO ADD NON PARTY ALTER EGO AS JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-20-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEJARANO, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URBAN CONSTRUCTION CORP. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION LOWE, JOHN ZE-FENG AKA JOHN LOWE, AKA JOHN LAY, AKA JOHN FENG $3,436.28 PRINCIPAL, $228.58 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,869.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice And Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
PLAINTIFF JOEL BEJARANO'S Notice And Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego As Judgment Debtor is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
